MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff 's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses within 14 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff 's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. However, the request for monetary sanctions is denied as counsel for plaintiff failed to attach exhibits B and C to the motion and the declaration of counsel does not comply with CCP Section 2023(c). COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
